title: The Curse of a Bloodline
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, King Harald as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Me?! what about you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Do you Condone this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DragGM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bring those survivors aboard, were saving them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if anyone's got a problem with that, I'll execute them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This won't end well for '10J...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DragGoti...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bring it on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Where are you going?! Rayleigh!! Gyaban!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't follow us!! sail the boat out to sea and wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...never existed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is that clear?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: West blue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: THE RECORDS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...KEPT BY G-11 and CPG...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...Concerning the top secret: Level s...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...Special mission on God Valley are sparse.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The names of the participants of the human hunt were purged.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you know the government had ties to that black monster?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Seems like an affront to justice:...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Information regarding the island's whereabouts, size, and population were also purged.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The number of casualties remains unknown to this day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: weez weez

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm with you there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you wanna leave the navy, you should join us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Weez

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hell no. If I quit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who'd protect the Marines?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's all about the mass, GARP.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: The Mass?! What are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: weez: Weez

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: armament Haki can normally counter devil fruit abilities...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I'm using conqueror's Haki coating to boot, so there's no way my attacks aren't doing anything!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's 'cause he's also using conqueror's Haki to guard himself. It's not a surprise we'd cancel each other out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Exactly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't overcome that, the damage won't go through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll lose sooner or later if we keep trading blows like this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We simply can't match a monster in a battle of attrition.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So next time we use Congueror's Haki, we should channel all of our mass into it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah!! Don't worry about how crippling the aftermath will be!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we do that, we probably won't survive this!!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
